# PHIL.105 ? Expected Value Optimization

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** expected_value_optimization
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Maximize expected value considering both probability and magnitude

## Application
Assess likelihood, estimate impact, calculate expected value, make high-EV bets even with risk
